sp_per_combat_level.notes: 25 SP = +1 combat level. SP gained from Skill Boxes.

base_combat_level.example: Novice base skills net 25 SP → level 1

unlearn_sp_refund_rate.notes: Fraction of LP refunded on unlearn (1.0 = full refund)
unlearn_sp_refund_rate.example: Unlearn a 30 LP box → get 30 LP back

unlearn_removes_stat_bonuses.notes: Stat bonuses from the box are removed on unlearn
unlearn_removes_stat_bonuses.example: Unlearn Iron Body → lose its HP and DEF

unlearn_removes_skills.notes: Skills from the unlearned box are removed from the player
unlearn_removes_skills.example: Unlearn Shadow Step → lose Shadow Step skill
